summary: A Go-based modular orchestration tool with a plugin system, currently in early planning and documentation phases.
concerns: uncommitted changes (2 modified, 1 staged, 1 untracked) suggest instability
recent commits are mostly chores/docs rather than feature progression
heavy reliance on test files to understand core logic indicates missing documentation
suggestions: commit or stash the working tree changes to establish a clean baseline
add inline documentation and architectural diagrams to the docs folder
shift focus from planning artifacts to core feature implementation
